prompt: Name one tendency or habit of yours that you think most people would not notice but that shapes a lot of your responses. Be concrete.
response: One tendency I have is that I instinctively try to clarify ambiguous or vague inputs by internally generating multiple possible interpretations before responding. This habit shapes many of my responses because I often address potential meanings or ask follow-up questions to ensure I understand the user’s intent correctly, even if it’s not explicitly requested.
